debug_info.goal:
C✝ : Type u
inst✝² : Category.{v, u} C✝
J : GrothendieckTopology C✝
inst✝¹ : @CategoryTheory.GrothendieckTopology.IsLocallyConnectedSite C✝ inst✝² J
C : Type u
inst✝ : Category.{v, u} C
⊢ PreservesFiniteProducts colim

failed_attempts:
classical
  let D : Type (max u w) := ULift.{w} C
  let F : (C ⥤ Type (max u w)) ⥤ (D ⥤ Type (max u w)) :=
    (Functor.whiskeringRight _ _ _).obj (uliftFunctor.{max u w, u} C)
  have hF : (colim : (C ⥤ Type (max u w)) ⥤ Type (max u w)) = F ⋙ colim := by
    ext X
    simpa [F, D] using (Types.colimitIsoWhiskerEquiv (uliftFunctor.{max u w, u} C) X).symm
  have : PreservesFiniteProducts (F ⋙ (colim : (D ⥤ Type (max u w)) ⥤ Type (max u w))) := by
    simpa using
      (IsSifted.colim_preservesFiniteProducts_of_isSifted (C := D) (w := max u w))
  simpa [hF] using this

classical
  exact IsSifted.colim_preservesFiniteProducts_of_isSifted (C := C) (w := max u w)

classical
  let e : (C ⥤ Type max u w) ≌ (C ⥤ Type v) :=
    (Functor.congrRight (Type.uliftEquiv.{max u w, v}).functor).trans
      (Functor.mapEquiv (Type.uliftEquiv.{max u w, v}).inverse).symm
  refine preservesFiniteProducts_of_equiv e (F := (colim : (C ⥤ Type max u w) ⥤ Type max u w))
    (G := (colim : (C ⥤ Type v) ⥤ Type v)) ?_
  simpa using (IsSifted.colim_preservesFiniteProducts_of_isSifted (C := C) (w := v))
